discovered_test_cases.name: VAL_COMPLEX_EXTRA_001_closure_pair_state
discovered_test_cases.description: Returned blocks should share and mutate captured state.

discovered_test_cases.name: VAL_COMPLEX_EXTRA_002_counter_while_true_log
discovered_test_cases.description: whileTrue: should drive an attribute-based loop and return the last body value.

discovered_test_cases.name: VAL_COMPLEX_EXTRA_003_super_argument_dispatch
discovered_test_cases.description: super as argument should still denote the same receiver object.

discovered_test_cases.name: VAL_COMPLEX_EXTRA_004_integer_from_shallow_copy
discovered_test_cases.description: from: on an Integer subclass should copy both the internal value and instance attributes.

discovered_test_cases.name: VAL_COMPLEX_EXTRA_005_string_from_slice_copy
discovered_test_cases.description: from: on a String subclass should preserve copied attributes and support further string operations.

discovered_test_cases.name: VAL_COMPLEX_EXTRA_006_times_repeat_accumulator
discovered_test_cases.description: timesRepeat: should pass the iteration number and allow nested stateful updates.

discovered_test_cases.name: VAL_COMPLEX_EXTRA_007_input_reader_closure
discovered_test_cases.description: Returned closures should retain both input-derived prefix and mutable counters.

discovered_test_cases.name: VAL_COMPLEX_EXTRA_008_boolean_loop_mix
discovered_test_cases.description: Boolean short-circuiting should combine correctly with whileTrue: driven state updates.

discovered_test_cases.name: VAL_COMPLEX_EXTRA_009_foreign_object_closure_self
discovered_test_cases.description: A foreign object executing a block should still observe the original lexical self.

discovered_test_cases.name: VAL_COMPLEX_EXTRA_010_nested_block_super_capture
discovered_test_cases.description: A returned nested block should preserve both self and super from its defining method context.
